en: I will take my stand at my watchpost and station myself on the tower, and look out to see what he will say to me, and what I will answer concerning my complaint.
zh: 我要站在哨崗，立在城樓， 留心看耶和華在我裡面說甚麼， 怎樣使我答覆自己的怨訴。

en: And the LORD answered me: "Write the vision; make it plain on tablets, so he may run who reads it.
zh: 耶和華回答我說： “把異象寫下，清楚地記在泥版上， 使讀的人容易明白，

en: For still the vision awaits its appointed time; it hastens to the end- it will not lie. If it seems slow, wait for it; it will surely come; it will not delay.
zh: 因這異象關乎一定的日期， 很快就要實現，決不徒然；縱有遲延，仍當等候， 因為它一定會來到，絕不耽誤。”

en: "Behold, his soul is puffed up; it is not upright within him, but the righteous shall live by his faith.
zh: 迦勒底人自高自大，心不正直； 然而義人必因信得生 。

en: "Moreover, wine is a traitor, an arrogant man who is never at rest. His greed is as wide as Sheol; like death he has never enough. He gathers for himself all nations and collects as his own all peoples."
zh: 財富 使人奸詐狂傲，不得安寧； 擴張慾望，如同陰間； 又像死亡，永不滿足。 他們招聚萬國，集合萬民，都歸自己。

en: Shall not all these take up their taunt against him, with scoffing and riddles for him, and say, "Woe to him who heaps up what is not his own- for how long?- and loads himself with pledges!"
zh: 這些國民豈不都用譬喻、諷刺、暗語指著他們說： “那些濫得他人財物的， 滿載別人抵押品的，有禍了！ 他們這樣要到幾時呢？”

en: Will not your debtors suddenly arise, and those awake who will make you tremble? Then you will be spoil for them.
zh: 你的債主 豈不忽然起來？ 擾亂你的豈不醒起？ 你就成了他們的擄物。

en: Because you have plundered many nations, all the remnant of the peoples shall plunder you, for the blood of man and violence to the earth, to cities and all who dwell in them.
zh: 因你搶掠多國，殺人流血， 向全地各城和其中所有居民施行暴力， 所以剩下的人也必搶掠你。

en: "Woe to him who gets evil gain for his house, to set his nest on high, to be safe from the reach of harm!
zh: 你這為自己的家積聚不義之財， 在高處搭窩，以逃避災害的， 有禍了！

en: You have devised shame for your house by cutting off many peoples; you have forfeited your life.
zh: 你剪除多國的民，反害了自己； 你所謀算的，使你的家蒙羞。

en: For the stone will cry out from the wall, and the beam from the woodwork respond.
zh: 石頭必從牆裡呼叫， 梁木必在樹中應聲。

en: "Woe to him who builds a town with blood and founds a city on iniquity!
zh: 你這用人血做城，憑邪惡立鎮的， 有禍了！

en: Behold, is it not from the LORD of hosts that peoples labor merely for fire, and nations weary themselves for nothing?
zh: 眾民勞碌得來的，被火焚燒； 列國辛勞而得的，終歸無有。 這不都出於萬軍之耶和華嗎？

en: For the earth will be filled with the knowledge of the glory of the LORD as the waters cover the sea.
zh: 認識耶和華之榮耀的知識，必充滿全地，好像眾水遮蓋海洋一樣。

en: "Woe to him who makes his neighbors drink- you pour out your wrath and make them drunk, in order to gaze at their nakedness!
zh: 你這請鄰舍喝酒，卻把毒物混入， 使他醉倒， 為要見他赤裸的，有禍了！

en: You will have your fill of shame instead of glory. Drink, yourself, and show your uncircumcision! The cup in the LORD'S right hand will come around to you, and utter shame will come upon your glory!
zh: 你滿有羞辱，沒有尊榮，你也喝到露出下體來吧！ 耶和華右手的杯必傳回來給你，使極大的羞辱取代你的尊榮。

en: The violence done to Lebanon will overwhelm you, as will the destruction of the beasts that terrified them, for the blood of man and violence to the earth, to cities and all who dwell in them.
zh: 因你向黎巴嫩使用暴力，殺滅驚嚇野獸；又殺人流血，向全地各城和其中所有居民施行暴力，就必受到報應 。

en: "What profit is an idol when its maker has shaped it, a metal image, a teacher of lies? For its maker trusts in his own creation when he makes speechless idols!
zh: 雕刻的像有甚麼用處呢？不過是匠人雕刻出來的； 鑄造的像、虛假的教師，有甚麼用處呢？ 匠人竟倚靠自己所做，那不能說話的假神。

en: Woe to him who says to a wooden thing, Awake; to a silent stone, Arise! Can this teach? Behold, it is overlaid with gold and silver, and there is no breath at all in it.
zh: 你這對木頭說“起來”， 對啞石說“醒吧”的人，有禍了！ 它怎能教導你呢？ 看哪！它包金鑲銀，裡面卻全無氣息。

en: But the LORD is in his holy temple; let all the earth keep silence before him."
zh: 然而耶和華在他的聖殿裡，全地當在他面前肅靜。
